name: JoAi: Start Meeting

description.en: Start a meeting with your agent to record and transcribe the conversation.
description.de: Starte ein Meeting mit deinem Agenten, um das Gespräch aufzunehmen und zu transkribieren.
description.es: Start a meeting with your agent to record and transcribe the conversation.
description.fr: Start a meeting with your agent to record and transcribe the conversation.
description.ro: Start a meeting with your agent to record and transcribe the conversation.
description.it: Start a meeting with your agent to record and transcribe the conversation.

bot: Use this when the user wants to start a meeting, begin recording a conversation, or start a transcription session.
